sponsorTerms.description: Summary statistics describing the study population(s).

analysisSets.name: Safety Population
analysisSets.description: All patients randomized and known to have taken at least one dose of randomized drug.

methods.name: bigN
methods.label: Descriptive summary statistics across groups for a categorical variable, based on subject occurrence

codeTemplate.code:
in_data = df2_analysisidhere |>
    dplyr::select(distinctlisthere) |>
    unique() |>
    dplyr::mutate(dummy = 'dummyvar')

df3_analysisidhere <-
  cards::ard_tabulate(
    data = in_data
   ,by = c(byvarshere)
   ,variables = dummy
  ) |>
dplyr::filter(stat_name == 'n') |>
 dplyr::mutate(operationid = 'opid1here')

methods.name: Summary by group of a continuous variable
methods.description: Descriptive summary statistics across groups for a continuous variable
methods.label: Grouped summary of continuous variable

codeTemplate.code:
in_data = df2_analysisidhere |>
    dplyr::select(distinctlisthere)

df3_analysisidhere <-
  cards::ard_summary(
    data = in_data
   ,by = c(byvarshere)
   ,variables = c('anavarhere')
   ,statistic = list('anavarhere' =
       cards::continuous_summary_fns(
           c("N","mean","sd","median","p25","p75","min","max")))
  ) |>
 dplyr::mutate(operationid = dplyr::case_when(
    stat_name == 'N'      ~ 'opid1here',
    stat_name == 'mean'   ~ 'opid2here',
    stat_name == 'sd'     ~ 'opid3here',
    stat_name == 'median' ~ 'opid4here',
    stat_name == 'p25'    ~ 'opid5here',
    stat_name == 'p75'    ~ 'opid6here',
    stat_name == 'min'    ~ 'opid7here',
    stat_name == 'max'    ~ 'opid8here'
  ))

outputs.name: Summary of Observed and Change from Baseline by Scheduled Visits - Vital Signs

subSection.text: Summary of Observed and Change from Baseline by Scheduled Visits - Vital Signs
Abbreviations: N, number of subjects in treatment arm; n, number of subjects with a non-missing result for a given parameter and visit; SD, standard deviation
Note: Baseline is defined as the last assessment that is non-missing prior to first dose of investigational product.
